label: 第98話
source_locator: 単行本12巻 目次 p.7
summary_short: 帳が解除され術師たちは渋谷駅へ進めるようになるが、猪野は甚爾に倒され重傷を負う。虎杖と伏黒は分かれ、冥冥も呪詛師を倒して地下へ向かう。
summary_full: 帳の基を破壊した虎杖と伏黒は、塔から落とされた猪野を鵺で救助する。降霊された甚爾は孫の魂を肉体情報で上書きし、オガミ婆を殺害。虎杖は五条救出へ向かい、伏黒は猪野を運ぶ。七海は瀕死の伊地知を発見し、冥冥は蛯名仁次を倒して地下へ進む。松濤文化村ストリートでは釘崎と新田明が重面春太に遭遇する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: With the curtain preventing sorcerers from entering 渋谷駅 finally lifted, the 呪術高専 teams can progress with the rescue operation. However, with 猪野 brutally injured, 悠仁 and 恵 have to split up, leaving the former alone in the haven of curses. Meanwhile, 冥冥 finishes up her battle against the 呪詛師 , 蛯名仁次 , and makes her way to 渋谷駅.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 悠仁 and 恵 rescue 猪野 but he's badly injured. With 粟坂二良 defeated, 悠仁 and 恵 break the two commissioned curtains he was holding, deactivating the curtain preventing sorcerers from entering 渋谷駅. This takes place at 10:04 P.M. on the 首都高速3号渋谷線 . All three cursed objects were broken by the boys but only one of them was actually used for casting the curtain. 恵 wants to interrogate the old man for some answers but he'll be unconscious for a while. Suddenly, 猪野 is thrown from the top of 渋谷 Tower . 恵 notices in time to summon 鵺 to rescue him from falling to his death. 悠仁 catches 猪野 and is horrified by the shape he's in. In 伏黒甚爾 's form, オガミ's grandson comments that the curtain is down and asks what they should do now. オガミ asks him to go down and keep killing sorcerers, but 甚爾's personality fully surfaces. He takes over the grandson's body and tells the old hag not to give him orders. " Kill sorcerers, huh? I guess that includes you! " Worried, オガミ jumps back and doesn't understand how this happened. She only meant to summon the body's information and not the soul with her 降霊術 術式 to prevent this worst-case scenario. 甚爾 doesn't know what's happening either but he figures his heavenly restricted body overtook the host's soul. オガミ doesn't believe this to be possible and 甚爾 decides to follow her orders, starting by killing the old sorcerer first. 悠仁 wants to go back up to the tower and avenge 猪野, but 恵 reveals he's not dead and asks 悠仁 to focus on rescuing 五条 sensei. While 悠仁 heads to the station, 恵 agrees to take care of 猪野. The latter doesn't like the idea of being alone in 渋谷 but 悠仁 is confident with having メカ丸 with him. They part ways and 恵 reminds 悠仁 that he'll kill him if he dies again. 七海 finds 伊地知 bleeding out on the ground. Meanwhile, 七海 finds 伊地知 unconscious and bleeding out at 渋谷駅 by exit 13. He is horrified by the sight of his dying friend. At the same time, on the 副都心線 ホーム between Meiji-Jingumae and 渋谷駅, 冥冥 easily overwhelms the 呪詛師 蛯名仁次 in close combat with her battle axe. " Service potential is life itself for me.♡ " 憂憂 sits on top of Ebina's defeated 呪霊 as 冥冥 explains how her innate technique works. 冥冥 grew up believing her 黒鳥操術 was a weak technique so she focused on being effective without it. It was worth the training as 冥冥 can honestly say she dominated Ebina thanks to it. He begs for forgiveness and asks to leave, but 憂憂 tells him to be quiet while his sister is still speaking. 冥冥 explains that reinforcing one's body with 呪力 can only take a sorcerer so far. Realizing this, 冥冥 was initially devastated but the realization allowed 冥冥 to go back and master her innate technique , making her into the blossoming grade 1 sorcerer she is today. 憂憂 applauds and makes Ebina clap for his sister as well. 冥冥 says it's time to die now that she's done and Ebina prostrates himself and continues begging for mercy. Amused, 冥冥 asks 憂憂 what a person's life value is proportional to. 憂憂 gladly answers that life's value is in proportion to how useful they are to 冥冥. Then she asks Ebina and he's unable to answer, remaining silent with his head bowed. The grade 1 jujutsu sorcerer believes fact that he can't answer as a 呪詛師 and a murderer is the reason he lost. She crushes his head with her axe and reveals service potential is life itself for her. 憂憂 tells his sister that the curtain has been taken down and 冥冥 gets excited at the prospect of 五条悟 owing her big time. Pseudo-夏油 watches her movements from the 渋谷駅 and is impressed she won so quickly. Meanwhile, on 松濤文化村ストリート , the 呪詛師 重面春太 encounters 新田明 and 釘崎野薔薇 in the middle of the road. 野薔薇 tells 新田 to stay behind her steps up to face the 呪詛師 alone. After slaying so many male managers, 重面 is excited to finally find some girls to play with.

key_events_verified_phase6: 帳の基が破壊され術師を阻む帳が解除される
伏黒と虎杖が重傷の猪野を救助する
甚爾の肉体情報が孫の魂を上回りオガミ婆を殺す
冥冥が蛯名仁次を倒す
釘崎と新田明が重面春太に遭遇する
verification_notes_phase6: 集英社公式12～14巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第六段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
